text: Design the game so all interactions, delays, staggers, and transitions are coordinated and in harmony, creating a natural, organized flow. Keep all frontend and backend connections clean, modular, and clearly structured, with easily swappable placeholders so this can serve as a reusable base engine for future arcade video poker variants and mods. Build the architecture thoughtfully now to minimize rewrites later, and keep long-term variant support in mind in every implementation decision.
